description_long: This is an adult male with a stocky build, standing upright with arms slightly away from the body. He is shirtless, wearing knee-length shorts, and appears to be barefoot. His skin is exposed on the upper body, arms, and legs, showing a natural human texture. The head is mostly bald with a short strip of hair on top, and facial features are visible but not highly detailed. The overall appearance suggests a casual, relaxed individual who might be encountered in an urban park, sidewalk, or residential area.
description: A shirtless adult male with a stocky build, wearing shorts and standing barefoot, with a mostly bald head and relaxed posture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the chest, abdomen, facial features, and both arms slightly extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, chest, and the arm hanging straight down.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the broad back, shoulders, and the back of the legs and head.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the body, arm, and leg, similar to the left side but mirrored.
attribute_hairstyle: mostly bald with a short strip of hair on top
